ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer (e.g., M, S) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (e.g., M, F) */,
  "estimated_yearly_income" INTEGER /* Estimated yearly income of the customer */,
  "number_of_contracts" INTEGER /* Number of contracts the customer has with the company */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target variable for predictive models (e.g., 1 for churn, 0 for no churn) */,
  "available_401k" INTEGER /* Availability of 401K (1 for available, 0 for not available) */,
  "customer_value_segment" INTEGER /* Customer value segment (e.g., 1 for high value, 2 for medium value) */,
  "churn_score" REAL /* Churn score (probability of churn) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Customer's employment status */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Customer's education level */,
  "last_interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last interaction with the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_activity" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the call */,
  "call_date" TEXT /* Date of the call */,
  "call_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the call in minutes */,
  "call_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the call (e.g., inquiry, complaint) */,
  "call_agent" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who handled the call */,
  "call_notes" TEXT /* Notes taken during the call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_activity_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "sentiment_rating" INTEGER /* Sentiment rating (e.g., 1 for negative, 5 for positive) */,
  "sentiment_text" TEXT /* Text of the interaction analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_source" TEXT /* Source of the sentiment analysis (e.g., call, web form) */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Private Investment, Insurance) */,
  "product_price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_features" TEXT /* List of features of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_products" (
  "customer_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-product relationship */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was purchased */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product usage (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the product is due for renewal */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the product renewal (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_products_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "web_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web activity */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the web activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of web activity (e.g., login, checkout) */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the web activity in seconds */,
  "page_visited" TEXT /* Specific page visited by the customer */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_activity_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "campaign_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_segment" TEXT /* Target customer segment (e.g., high value, medium value) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the campaign */,
  "campaign_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_customers" (
  "campaign_customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign-customer relationship */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Response status (e.g., responded, did not respond) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's response */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the customer's response */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the customer's engagement with the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_customers_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_customers_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer service, marketing analyst, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
